docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAIAN GANZON RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. FILED BY DEFENDANT GANZON, DAIAN
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT GANZON, DAIAN
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT DAIAN GANZON IS PRESENT, VIA COURTCALL TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE LUBARSKY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
